name: Absolute Referent Device (ARD)
bonus_text: +10% to any Time Machine skill roll
details: Measures temporal energy picked up by time travel and expresses it relative to trip start.

name: Temporal Energy Sensor (TE Feelie)
bonus_text: +15% to any Time Machine skill roll
details: Detects local temporal energy and estimates time relative to operator starting point.

name: Quantum Differential Device (Q-Dump)
bonus_text: +20% to any Time Machine skill roll

name: Dimensional Continuum Measurement/Recording Device (DCD)
bonus_text: +15% to Cross-Dimensional Hop to a previously recorded destination
details: Records relative coordinates of cross-dimensional locations and stores transit history.

name: Cross-Dimensional Disturbance Detector (Triple-D)
bonus_text: +20% to jump to active signal, +10% to faded recorded signal
details: Scans for active cross-dimensional devices and homes in on their signals.

name: Cross-Dimensional Signal Beacon
details: Marks dimensions by emitting strong cross-dimensional signals.
